request: Reviewer R10. Read-only. Review DinoBrain unfinished OS completion plan for end-to-end acceptance, risk, and final consensus integrity. Inspect at minimum: <machine-local-path> <machine-local-path> docs\OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs\VERIFICATION.md, AGENTS.md, scripts\verify-closed-loop-goal.mjs, and current state artifacts if useful. Output ONLY: reviewer_id=R10; verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED; blocking_objections=[...]; required_doc_changes=[...]; evidence_files=[...]. Judge whether the document's final completion bar, global acceptance tests, reviewer protocol, and implementation order are sufficient and whether it avoids falsely claiming completion. If no blocking objection, verdict AGREE.
